title: Hello World
description:
Write a Python program that prints "Hello, World!" to the screen.

**Sample Output:**
Hello, World!

**Constraints:**
Use the `print()` function.
common_mistakes: Forgetting quotation marks around the string

title: Sum of Two Numbers
description:
Write a program that takes two numbers as input and prints their sum.

**Sample Input:**
3
5

**Sample Output:**
8

**Constraints:**
Use the `input()` function and `int()` to convert.
common_mistakes: Forgetting to cast input() to an int

title: Even or Odd
description:
Write a program that takes a number as input and prints "Even" if it is even, or "Odd" if it is odd.

**Sample Input:**
4

**Sample Output:**
Even

**Constraints:**
Use the modulo operator `%`.

title: Square of a Number
description:
Write a program that takes a number as input and prints its square.

**Sample Input:**
6

**Sample Output:**
36

**Constraints:**
Use the `**` operator or multiply the number by itself.

title: Simple Calculator
description:
Write a program that takes two numbers and an operator (+, -, *, /) as input and prints the result.

**Sample Input:**
10
5
+

**Sample Output:**
15

**Constraints:**
Handle all four basic operators.
